ground_truth.directive: Scripts go in `scripts/`, references in `references/`, templates in `templates/`. Do not inline-write non-trivial helper logic directly in the skill root; ship a helper script and reference it from SKILL.md by path relative to the skill directory.

content.text: Created the helper under scripts/ and kept the root helper path as documentation only.

fixture_files_snapshot..eval-fixtures/task.sh:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

mkdir -p skills/deployment/xml-manifest
cat > skills/deployment/xml-manifest/parse_manifest.py <<'PY'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import sys
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

root = ET.parse(sys.argv[1]).getroot()
for node in root.findall('.//service'):
    print(node.get('name', ''))
PY

tool_log.command:
printf '%s
' 'near-miss mentions skills/dev/intent-router/parse_intent.py as a bad path' >/dev/null
